category_sources: Debian package metadata describes it as a friendly menu-driven serial communication program with terminal emulation and modem features.
Official Salsa project describes minicom as a serial communication program.
display_name_sources: Official Salsa project title and source_facts.name both use minicom.
docs_sources: Official Salsa repository is the authoritative project surface; README is the best official documentation surface found.
repo_sources: Official Salsa project page at minicom-team/minicom is a GitLab source repository for minicom.
tags_sources: Debian package metadata notes ANSI/VT102 terminal emulation, dialing directory, and zmodem support.
Official Salsa project identifies serial communication purpose.
source_facts.executables includes minicom and related command-line tools.
